Blushing Blossoms features delicate, decorative, phallic iconography and is inspired by Berriblue's love for William Morris. The street art series 'Willies,' upon which this scarf was based, has proven very popular in Dublin, Porto, and beyond.

Jasmin & Bones is a unique limited edition illustrated silk scarf, based on several large murals painted by Berriblue in 2018. Snapshot illustrations are framed on a cluttered, erratic backdrop. The scarf features a bones and flowers motif. This design is limited to 100 copies.

This beautiful unisex scarf is printed on 100% habotai silk with hand rolled hems. It features a heart and womb motif and three slogans, 'My Body My Choice,' 'Her Body Her Choice,' and 'Pro Choice.' It can be worn different ways to show off the different slogans.
